	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_18_0_17530432_1401077216468_217114_17493'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>252, 28, 525, 84</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;color:#660000; font-size:18pt;&quot;&gt;Laptop Cost&amp;#160;Analysis&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
This sample demonstrates how to use Cameo Simulation Toolkit to perform a cost analysis with rollup pattern. The objective of the cost rollup analysis in this sample is to calculate the total cost of a laptop, which is the sum of its parts should not exceed $200.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Class' xmi:id='_18_0_17530432_1401077362794_894100_17499'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_1beta_be00301_1399203011255_755305_14912'/>
		<geometry>252, 126, 327, 72</geometry>
		<compartment xmi:value='_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147937729182_464142_2439^_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147937806133_309234_2611' compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Class' xmi:id='_18_0_17530432_1401078100367_393957_17525'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_1beta_be00301_1399203225151_229998_15102'/>
		<geometry>672, 105, 89, 103</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Dependency' xmi:id='_18_0_17530432_1401078105508_274630_17556'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_18_1beta_be00301_1399203403074_978311_15329'/>
		<linkFirstEndID xmi:idref='_18_0_17530432_1401077362794_894100_17499'/>
		<linkSecondEndID xmi:idref='_18_0_17530432_1401078100367_393957_17525'/>
		<geometry>579, 159; 672, 157; </geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<nameVisible xmi:value='true'/>
		<mdOwnedViews>
			<mdElement elementClass='TextBoxWithIcon' xmi:id='_18_0_17530432_1401078105498_326734_17553'>
				<geometry>605, 143, 41, 12</geometry>
				<mdOwnedViews/>
				<text>«refine»</text>
			</mdElement>
		</mdOwnedViews>
		<linkStereotypeID xmi:idref='_18_0_17530432_1401078105498_326734_17553'/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_18_0_17530432_1401078176606_679771_17568'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>252, 357, 532, 90</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p align=&quot;left&quot;&gt;
The &lt;b&gt;maxCost&lt;/b&gt; constraint block is created to refine the original requirements as shown above.      
&lt;br&gt;&lt;b&gt;Cost Analysis&lt;/b&gt; is a block that is the context of our analysis. Here, an instance specification whose classifier is &lt;b&gt;Cost Analysis&lt;/b&gt;, will be executed to calculate the &lt;b&gt;total cost&lt;/b&gt; of the laptop. If it exceeds $200, Cameo Simulation Toolkit will highlight the cost in red in the Variables pane. If you pause your mouse pointer over the highlighted totalCost, you will see both failed constraint and unsatisfied requirements appear in a tooltip.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
	</mdElement>
